day4_lunch_start.name: Me
day4_lunch_start.text: *It's lunchtime. I need to decide where to go.*

day4_lunch_choice.name: Me
day4_lunch_choice.text: *Lunch is the only window I have. I need to move fast.*

day4_lunch_yuna_1.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_1.text: *The photography club room. The door is locked. It was open until yesterday.*

day4_lunch_yuna_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_2.text: *I looked around. Nobody in the hallway. One of the windows isn't fully locked. I squeezed through.*

day4_lunch_yuna_4.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_4.text: *The other lockers have dust buildup. Only Yuna's looks like it was wiped down. Someone cleaned it out.*

day4_lunch_yuna_5.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_5.text: *The plywood at the bottom of the locker is slightly raised. A false bottom. Yuna's camera is hidden inside.*

day4_lunch_yuna_6.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_6.text: *I took the camera out. Almost no battery left. I powered it on.*

day4_lunch_yuna_7.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_7.text: *Photo gallery. Over 200 pictures. Mostly school scenery. They look ordinary, but -- the same people appear in every corner. People in suits. Not parents. Evidence Yuna collected over three years.*

day4_lunch_yuna_8.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_8.text: *The last photo: stairs leading underground. In the corner, handwritten text: **'Down here -- Yu'***

day4_lunch_yuna_9.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_9.text: *The date is last night. Yuna took this photo just before she disappeared.*

day4_lunch_yuna_10.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_10.text: *End of the old building hallway. 'Authorized Personnel Only.' A rusted door. The lock is broken.*

day4_lunch_yuna_11.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_11.text: *It was broken from the inside. Yuna went through here.*

day4_lunch_yuna_13.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_13.text: *First flight of stairs. No lights. I turned on my phone's flashlight.*

day4_lunch_yuna_14.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_14.text: *A damp smell. Concrete and mold. And -- the smell of disinfectant. Like a hospital.*

day4_lunch_yuna_15.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_15.text: *Second flight. Third. The air grows heavier. Humidity rises. Moisture beads on the walls.*

day4_lunch_yuna_16.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_16.text: *I stopped where the stairs turn. Fluorescent light seeps from below. Someone left it on.*

day4_lunch_yuna_17.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_17.text: *My heart is pounding. I can still turn back. Right now, I still can.*

day4_lunch_yuna_18.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_18.text: *...What changes if I turn back? Yuna is down here. -- I go down.*

day4_lunch_yuna_20.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_20.text: ***It's vast. The size of two classrooms. Low ceiling. Fluorescent lights flicker and buzz.***

day4_lunch_yuna_21.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_21.text: ***Beds. Multiple. Medical beds. Six of them. Arranged in a row. Leather straps on the armrests. Scratch marks on the straps. Signs of someone struggling while restrained.***

day4_lunch_yuna_22.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_22.text: ***Medical equipment. An ECG monitor, an EEG machine. The power is off, but standby LEDs blink red.***

day4_lunch_yuna_23.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_23.text: ***A medicine cabinet. The glass door is shattered. Radial cracks as if someone punched it, shards scattered on the floor. -- It was Yuna. She made it this far before they caught her.*** *Ampoules and syringes are lined up neatly. Labels attached -- 'M-07', 'M-09', 'S-13'. Is the last one currently in use?*

day4_lunch_yuna_24.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_24.text: *There's a refrigerator next to the cabinet. I opened it. Blood packs lined up in rows. Names written on them. -- All unfamiliar names. No, maybe I do know them. They might be the names of #1 through #12.*

day4_lunch_yuna_25.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_25.text: *Papers are scattered on the floor. A filing cabinet has been knocked over -- Yuna must have toppled it while smashing the medicine cabinet. I picked up the papers. My hands are shaking too much to read them in order.*

day4_lunch_yuna_26.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_26.text: *A chart hangs on the wall. 'Subject Response Records.' More documents have fallen beneath the chart.*

day4_lunch_yuna_27.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_27.text: *I read. Numbers and photos are listed.*

day4_lunch_yuna_28.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_28.text: *#1 -- Photo: a **boy** with short black hair. Name: Kim Dojin. Notes: 'Initial response favorable. Day 3 escape attempt. Immediately retrieved.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_29.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_29.text: *I stared at the face in the photo. ...The shape of the lips. The distance between the eyes. The arrangement of the features --*

day4_lunch_yuna_31.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_31.text: *#3 -- Photo: a **boy** with brown hair. Name: Park Seojin. Notes: 'Day 4 basement discovery. Escape attempt, secured at main gate. Signs of drug resistance.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_32.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_32.text: *...Day 4 basement discovery. Just like me. The third one did the same thing I'm doing now.*

day4_lunch_yuna_33.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_33.text: *#4 -- Jeong Hayul. #5 -- Kang Minhyuk. #6 -- Yoon Jaewon. All 'Day 5 standard processing.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_34.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_34.text: *Every time those four characters -- 'standard processing' -- repeat, my fingers tremble harder.*

day4_lunch_yuna_35.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_35.text: *#13 -- My name. My photo. The column next to the date: 'In progress.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_36.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_36.text: *My legs give out. I leaned against the wall. Nearly slid to the floor.*

day4_lunch_yuna_37.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_37.text: *...Number 13. I am the thirteenth. Living in the same body for the thirteenth time. Each time with a different name. Each time through the same five days.*

day4_lunch_yuna_39.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_39.text: *My body froze. I slowly looked toward the sound.*

day4_lunch_yuna_40.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_40.text: *The last bed. A curtain is drawn around it. Beyond the curtain, I can see someone's feet. Bare. Bruises on the ankles.*

day4_lunch_yuna_43.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_43.text: *It's Yuna. She's strapped to the bed -- no, she was strapped. One of the leather bindings is partially undone. Signs of her struggling to free herself.*

day4_lunch_yuna_44.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_44.text: *Her face is pale. Her lips are cracked. Three injection marks on her arm.*

day4_lunch_yuna_45.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_45.text: *Her eyes lose focus, then recognize me.*

day4_lunch_yuna_48.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_48.text: *I undid Yuna's straps. The knots are tight. My nails tore as I barely managed to undo them. Yuna's hands are cold. -- My hands are cold too.*

day4_lunch_yuna_51.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_51.text: *Focus returns to Yuna's eyes. Faintly. She seems to realize I've seen the records. Gasping, she speaks.*

day4_lunch_yuna_52.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_52.text: "Senpai... number seven... look at the number seven record..."

day4_lunch_yuna_53.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_53.text: *Yuna's finger points to the pile of documents scattered on the floor. Her hand trembles. But the direction is certain.*

day4_lunch_yuna_54.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_54.text: *I dug through the papers. Found it where Yuna pointed.*

day4_lunch_yuna_55.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_55.text: *#7 -- Photo: a boy with long hair. Name: Kim Taeho. ...A gaunt face. Cheekbones showing through. The angle of the cheekbones. The corners of the eyes. But the face is -- mine.*

day4_lunch_yuna_56.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_56.text: *#7's notes section is long. 'Significant drug resistance response. Contact with facility student Lee Seolhwa (F). Escape conspiracy. Result: Subject secured, Lee Seolhwa permanently processed. Subject fully wiped and reinserted.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_57.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_57.text: "...Lee Seolhwa... the girl who talks to you in the hallway... she's in here..."

day4_lunch_yuna_58.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_58.text: *Yuna can't finish her sentence. She's short of breath. It's the drugs.*

day4_lunch_yuna_59.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_59.text: *I dig through the remaining documents. My hands shake so much that papers drop to the floor. I don't pick them up.*

day4_lunch_yuna_60.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_60.text: *#8 -- Choi Siwoo. #9 -- Han Jiho. 'Day 3 early detection.' ...He only lasted three days.*

day4_lunch_yuna_61.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_61.text: *#10 -- Song Yejun. #11 -- Oh Taehyun. #12 -- Lim Seoyul. All 'Day 5 processing complete.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_62.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_62.text: ***I look at the photos one by one. Different hair colors. Different names. But they're all boys. They all have -- the same face.***

day4_lunch_yuna_63.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_63.text: ***Just as Yuna showed me. Thirteen boys. Thirteen different names, the same face. My face.***

day4_lunch_yuna_64.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_64.text: *I dig through more of the documents.*

day4_lunch_yuna_65.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_65.text: ***'Repeated Trial Record for Identical Subject -- Project Nevergrad'***

day4_lunch_yuna_66.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_66.text: ***'Subject Unique Identifier: [REDACTED]. Number of Trials: 13. Identity Package Change History: See Appendix B'***

day4_lunch_yuna_67.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_67.text: *'Identity package.' They call swapping out names and memories a 'package.' A person's entire life -- treated like a replaceable part.*

day4_lunch_yuna_69.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_69.text: *Yuna points from where she sits propped against the bed. Another stack of documents. Neat handwriting. Orderly sentences. Sentences that describe a person like an object. -- Eunsu's observation journal.*

day4_lunch_yuna_70.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_70.text: ***'Trial #7 Notes: Drug resistance response. External contact with facility student Lee Seolhwa (F, age 17) confirmed. Conspired to attempt escape. Result: Lee Seolhwa -- assessed as uncorrectable, permanently isolated. Subject -- full memory wipe, reinserted as #8'***

day4_lunch_yuna_71.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_71.text: *...Lee Seolhwa. A facility student. During the seventh trial... the person who tried to escape with me.*

day4_lunch_yuna_72.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_72.text: ***And -- the person who was 'permanently isolated' while my memory was being erased.***

day4_lunch_yuna_73.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_73.text: *...'Permanently isolated.' Elsewhere in the documents, it says 'disposed of.' Same meaning.*

day4_lunch_yuna_74.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_74.text: *...Seolhwa. The girl sitting in the back row of the classroom. Is she the same person as the 'Lee Seolhwa' in these records?*

day4_lunch_yuna_75.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_75.text: ***'Post-Trial #8 Observation: Subject repeatedly observed attempting conversation with empty space. Exhibits defense mechanism of relying on nonexistent other (referred to as "Lee Seolhwa"). Presumed to be residual memory cohesion phenomenon. Medication dosage review required.'***

day4_lunch_yuna_76.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_76.text: *...Eunsu wrote this. The person who smiled at me while watching me. Wrote 'medication dosage review required.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_77.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_77.text: ***'Trials #9-#12: Same phenomenon persists. Subject perceives "Lee Seolhwa" in each cycle, however said individual was already disposed of at the end of Trial #7. Confirmed as hallucination.'***

day4_lunch_yuna_78.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_78.text: ***'Addendum: Subject's dependence on hallucination is high; forced erasure risks psychological collapse. Non-intervention is rational at this stage. No intervention necessary as long as hallucination contributes to subject's stability.'***

day4_lunch_yuna_79.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_79.text: *...Non-intervention. They knew I was seeing hallucinations of a dead person -- and left it alone because it 'contributed to my stability.'*

day4_lunch_yuna_81.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_81.text: ***The girl sitting in the back row. The girl watching me from the hallway. The girl who said 'remember me.' All of it -- fabricated inside my head.***

day4_lunch_yuna_82.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_82.text: *The last page of the observation journal. The date is two days ago.*

day4_lunch_yuna_83.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_83.text: ***'Trial #13 Day 2 Observation: Contact with Choi Yuna (external observer) confirmed. Risk of evidence leak. Immediate isolation recommended.'***

day4_lunch_yuna_84.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_84.text: ***'Trial #13 Day 3 Addendum: Choi Yuna isolation complete. Board report deferred -- reporting would reveal existence of external observer, resulting in project security failure assessment and potential subject disposal. Self-handling with post-incident report planned.'***

day4_lunch_yuna_85.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_85.text: *...Two days ago. The very day Yuna showed me the photos. Eunsu knew about it.*

day4_lunch_yuna_87.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_87.text: ***Seolhwa died a year ago. She died for me. And I, with my memory erased -- had been laughing and eating with the people who killed her.***

day4_lunch_yuna_88.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_88.text: *I looked at Yuna. She read all of this too. Alone. While restrained.*

day4_lunch_yuna_89.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_89.text: "...We need to... get out of here. They'll... come soon."

day4_lunch_yuna_90.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_90.text: "When lunch ends... Riin comes... down here. Every time..."

day4_lunch_yuna_91.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_91.text: *Yuna grabs onto me. No strength in her grip.*

day4_lunch_yuna_92.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_92.text: "...Senpai. Everything is in this camera. Three years... of evidence."

day4_lunch_yuna_93.name: Yuna
day4_lunch_yuna_93.text: "If we get out of here... the police... the news..."

day4_lunch_yuna_escape.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_escape.text: *I put Yuna's arm over my shoulder. I can barely feel her weight. ...Was she always this light? I climb the stairs.*

day4_lunch_yuna_hide.name: Me
day4_lunch_yuna_hide.text: *I took Yuna behind the curtain. We held our breath. Yuna's heartbeat reaches my chest.*

day4_lunch_nurse_1.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_1.text: *Riin is transferring something into a syringe in front of the medicine cabinet.*

day4_lunch_nurse_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_2.text: *I can see the label on the ampoule. 'M-13.' That's not a medical code. It looks like an experiment code.*

day4_lunch_nurse_5.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_5.text: *She hides the syringe behind her back. Casually. But I saw it.*

day4_lunch_nurse_7.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_7.text: *Riin's expression changed for just a moment. Half a second. Her eyes sharpened -- then softened again.*

day4_lunch_nurse_8.name: Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_8.text: "...Why are you staring at me like that? {name}, you're not having any strange thoughts, are you?"

day4_lunch_nurse_9.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_9.text: *Her voice went cold for an instant, then turned gentle again.*

day4_lunch_nurse_11.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_11.text: *She said 'will be fine.' Not 'is fine.' Future tense.*

day4_lunch_nurse_12.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_12.text: *...Riin knows that Yuna is not fine right now.*

day4_lunch_nurse_13.name: Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_13.text: "...You look tired. Seems like you haven't been sleeping well lately."

day4_lunch_nurse_14.name: Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_14.text: "Want me to give you something? To help you sleep."

day4_lunch_nurse_15.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_15.text: *A smiling face. A soft voice. A syringe in hand.*

day4_lunch_nurse_16.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_16.text: *...I declined and left. Behind me, I heard Riin muttering something. I pretended not to hear.*

day4_lunch_roof_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_2.text: *Writing carved beneath the railing. Deeply etched with a knife.*

day4_lunch_roof_3.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_3.text: ***'There's only one way out. -- Lee Seolhwa'***

day4_lunch_roof_4.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_4.text: *Below it, in smaller letters: ***'The answer is underground'***

day4_lunch_roof_5.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_5.text: *I touched the letters with my fingers. Cold. Writing carved into a metal railing. Old marks.*

day4_lunch_roof_6.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_6.text: *...This wasn't carved by a hallucination. This is a physically existing mark.*

day4_lunch_roof_7.name: Me
day4_lunch_roof_7.text: *Seolhwa carved this -- when she was actually here.*
